description: The Habitat Garden has been designed to bring together native bushland character, wild meadow softness, and selective productive planting. A habitat-rich, low-chemical landscape that supports pollinators, small birds, butterflies, and local insect life while providing a calming daily outlook from the home. The planting palette prioritises Victorian natives, favouring species indigenous to the Surrey Hills area, selected for year-round flowering, seasonal movement, and layered ecological function. This forward-thinking design focuses on long-term resilience, sensory experience and supporting the re-establishment of local biodiversity.

habitat.planting_method: Layered ecological planting -- Victorian indigenous species

activity_log.title: The Habitat Garden
activity_log.notes: The Habitat Garden has been designed to bring together native bushland character, wild meadow softness, and selective productive planting. A habitat-rich, low-chemical landscape that supports pollinators, small birds, butterflies, and local insect life while providing a calming daily outlook from the home. The planting palette prioritises Victorian natives, favouring species indigenous to the Surrey Hills area, selected for year-round flowering, seasonal movement, and layered ecological function. This forward-thinking design focuses on long-term resilience, sensory experience and supporting the re-establishment of local biodiversity.

activity_log.title: Installation of Bio Mulch
activity_log.notes: Bio mulch installed across planting zones.

activity_log.title: Installation of Organic Soil Mix
activity_log.notes: Organic soil mix installed to improve soil health and water retention.

activity_log.title: Rock installation and placement
activity_log.notes: Rocks placed to create thermal mass for lizards, insects and soil life.

activity_log.title: Blow down and tidy of grounds
Excavation and removal of existing plants
activity_log.notes: Existing non-indigenous plants removed. Site cleared for ecological planting.

activity_log.title: Weeding
activity_log.notes: Weed pressure reduced ahead of planting installation.

activity_log.title: Ground contouring and shaping
activity_log.notes: Ground shaped to direct water movement and create planting zones.

activity_log.title: Plant Placement
activity_log.notes: Plants positioned across site prior to planting.

activity_log.title: Planting
activity_log.notes: 20 indigenous species planted across ground, shrub and emerging canopy layers.

activity_log.title: Project Wrap
activity_log.notes: Site completed, cleaned and handed over.
